headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on UDR, Lowers Price Target to $42
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains UDR (NYSE:UDR) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $43 to $42.
